Form_EditionIdentifier_A.tu: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM).

Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g. agency or brokerage).

Form_CompletionDate_A.tu: Enter date: The date on which the form is completed.

Producer_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The full name of the producer/agency.

Policy_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A.tu: Enter identifier: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols. If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number.

Policy_EffectiveDate_A.tu: Enter date: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.

Insurer_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name.

Insurer_NAICCode_A.tu: Enter code: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the NAIC.

NamedInsured_FullName_A.tu: Enter text: The named insured(s) as it/they will appear on the policy declarations page.

ContractorsUnderwriting_ContractorTypeDe.tu: Enter text: The type of contractor.

ContractorsUnderwriting_YearsExperienceC.tu: Enter number: The contractor's number of years of experience.

BusinessInformation_FullTimeEmployeeCoun.tu: Enter number: The number of full time employees.

BusinessInformation_PartTimeEmployeeCoun.tu: Enter number: The number of part time employees.

ContractorsUnderwriting_LicenseNumberIde.tu: Enter identifier: The state or local license number for the applicant.

ContractorsUnderwriting_LicenseHolder_Ow.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the license holder is the owner of the business.

ContractorsUnderwriting_LicenseHolder_Of.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the license holder is an officer of the business.

ContractorsUnderwriting_LicenseHolder_Em.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the license holder is an employee of the business.

ContractorsUnderwriting_LicenseHolder_Ot.tu: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the license holder has a relationship with the business other than those listed.
Enter text: The relationship the license holder has with the business.

ContractorsUnderwriting_ResidentialWorkP.tu: Enter percentage: The percentage of work that is residential.

ContractorsUnderwriting_CommercialWorkPe.tu: Enter percentage: The percentage of work that is commercial.

ContractorsUnderwriting_NewConstructionW.tu: Enter percentage: The percentage of work that is new construction.

ContractorsUnderwriting_RemodelWorkPerce.tu: Enter percentage: The percentage of work that is remodeling.

BusinessInformation_AnnualGrossReceiptsA.tu: Enter amount: The total annual gross sales or receipts.

BusinessInformation_TotalPayrollAmount_A.tu: Enter amount: The total annual payroll of the business in whole dollars.

GeneralLiability_EachOccurrence_LimitAmo.tu: Enter limit: The general liability, each occurrence limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is the minimum limit.

GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitA.tu: Enter limit: The general liability, general aggregate limit amount. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is the minimum limit.

ContractorsUnderwriting_SubcontractedWor.tu: Enter amount: The total cost of subcontracted work for the past 12 months.
